race.description: Tamworth City Toyota Tamworth Cup Prelude Hcp
race.comment: HULU (7) finished 1.2 lengths from the winner over 1280m at Muswellbrook, in a return to form. Peaks for this and maps for a soft run. Rates well for this contest and will be tough to beat. DALE (10) resumes for a sharp Scone stable, and it strikes at 27% at this track. Will race over further, but has been well-prepared for his return and won at his only start at the track. Draws low and has the figures to give this a shake if he's presented on song. SUPREME COMMAND (5) tackled a rich Quality last start at Muswellbrook over 1500m, beaten 3.5 lengths at big odds. His form at Coffs Harbour and Newcastle prior reads well. Much better placed and will carry just 54kg with the big claim. AUZSTAR (2) knuckled down strongly to get within 0.8 lengths of the winner last start over 1420m at Grafton. Among the main hopes.
